task_completion.description: Verify the vital signs recording was exported to a CSV file on the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file named 'case_0002_vitals.csv' visible on the Desktop or in a File Explorer window pointing to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop.

task_completion.description: Verify the anesthetic summary text file was created on the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file named 'anesthetic_summary_0002.txt' visible on the Desktop, in File Explorer, or open in a text editor like Notepad.

task_completion.description: Verify the summary includes the case identification and total recording duration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Read the contents of 'anesthetic_summary_0002.txt'. It must explicitly mention Case 0002 and a total recording duration of approximately 4 hours 22 minutes (or ~4h 22m 20s).

task_completion.description: Verify the summary includes the correctly calculated surgical duration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Read the contents of the text file. It must state the surgical duration is approximately 3 hours 35 minutes (or 215 minutes), calculated from the start and finish events.

task_completion.description: Verify the summary lists all monitored physiological parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Read the contents of the text file. It must list the 9 parameters: ECG_II, ECG_V5, PLETH, HR, ST_V5, PLETH_SPO2, PLETH_HR, VENT_RR, and VENT_MV.

task_completion.description: Verify the summary includes a brief clinical narrative.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Read the contents of the text file. Look for a descriptive paragraph or sentences summarizing the monitoring data and vital signs patterns, rather than just a list of numbers.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Vital Recorder application GUI to find the information and export the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing Vital Recorder as the active window, with the agent clicking through menus (like File -> Export) or viewing the event markers.

integrity.description: Verify the files were actually saved to the requested Desktop directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look at the file paths in the text editor title bar, save dialogs, or File Explorer address bar to ensure they are in C:\Users\Docker\Desktop.

integrity.description: Verify the agent generated a genuine clinical narrative and didn't just copy-paste the prompt instructions.
integrity.visual_evidence: The clinical narrative in the text file should read like a medical summary of the data, not a repetition of the task description's requirements.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Case 0002 total recording duration is approximately 4 hours 22 minutes 20 seconds. Surgery started at 00:28:41 and finished at 04:03:41, making the correct calculated surgical duration ~3 hours 35 minutes (215 minutes). The 9 monitored parameters that must be listed are: ECG_II, ECG_V5, PLETH, HR, ST_V5, PLETH_SPO2, PLETH_HR, VENT_RR, and VENT_MV.
